text: The first image places me on the edge of a gathering, peering through glass at people in the midst of a conversation or perhaps a discussion. I feel separated, as if I am an observer rather than a participant—a certain distance yawns between myself and the group. The geometry of the room and the tilt of my gaze suggest disorientation or anticipation. In the second image, I stand before a vibrant R+D exhibit, the colors electric and the words inviting. Here, interest stirs within me. Possibility, curiosity, and a sense of potential fill the air. I feel both stimulated by the ideas presented and aware that I am only beginning to scratch the surface of human innovation and our relationship with knowledge.
